scripts.test: npm run generate-tests && SUT=neos9 FLOW_CONTEXT=Production/E2E-SUT npx playwright test
scripts.test:registration: npm run generate-tests && SUT=neos9 FLOW_CONTEXT=Production/E2E-SUT npx playwright test --grep @registration
scripts.test:login: npm run generate-tests && SUT=neos9 FLOW_CONTEXT=Production/E2E-SUT npx playwright test --grep @login
scripts.test:reset-password: npm run generate-tests && SUT=neos9 FLOW_CONTEXT=Production/E2E-SUT npx playwright test --grep @reset-password
scripts.test:profile: npm run generate-tests && SUT=neos9 FLOW_CONTEXT=Production/E2E-SUT npx playwright test --grep @profile
